expectations.evidence: Uses vulnerability__get_cves as a single global call. Does not invoke vulnerability__get_system_cves.
Uses impact='3,4' (numeric IDs for Important+Critical). Explicitly cites tool-invocation-rules: 'the impact parameter uses comma-separated numeric IDs: 4=Critical, 3=Important'.
All params match MCP schema: impact (not severity), advisory_available='true' (not affecting), sort='-cvss_score' (string). No nonexistent parameter names used.
Uses sort='-cvss_score' to surface highest-severity CVEs first.
Uses advisory_available='true' to restrict to CVEs with available advisories.
